summary: Iteration 132 - Video Generation Bug Fix Testing: Tested download_file function fix, image/voice/video generation endpoints, and automatic credit refund on failure. All 22 backend tests passed. The download_file function correctly handles multiple URL sources (local files, FRONTEND_URL, BACKEND_PUBLIC_URL, preview URL). Credit refund on video generation failure is working correctly.

critical.issue: FFmpeg not installed on preview environment - video rendering fails with '[Errno 2] No such file or directory: ffmpeg'
critical.note: This is an environment issue, not a code bug. FFmpeg needs to be installed on production for video rendering to work.

action_items: Install FFmpeg on production server for video rendering functionality
Verify FFmpeg is available in the production Docker image or Kubernetes deployment
critical_code_review_comments: download_file function at line 1406 correctly tries multiple URLs: local path, BACKEND_PUBLIC_URL, FRONTEND_URL, and preview URL fallback
Automatic credit refund implemented in render_video_task catch block (lines 1347-1391) - verified working
Audio file handling uses download_file for consistency (line 1191) - correctly handles /static/ paths
File cleanup service configured to 30 minutes expiry - appropriate for video generation workflow
Pre-flight check in video/assemble endpoint validates files exist before deducting credits (lines 1065-1089)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and project
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) download_file function fix verified in code - tries local path first, then remote URLs. 2) Automatic credit refund working - verified in logs and user credits. 3) FFmpeg not installed on preview - main agent should verify FFmpeg is in production Docker image. 4) Voice generation works (tested successfully). 5) Image generation works but images get cleaned up after 30 mins.

bug_fixes_verified.download_file_multiple_url_fallback: VERIFIED - code review confirms FRONTEND_URL, BACKEND_PUBLIC_URL, and preview URL fallbacks
bug_fixes_verified.automatic_credit_refund: VERIFIED - logs show 'Refunded 20 credits to user' for failed job
bug_fixes_verified.pre_flight_file_check: VERIFIED - video/assemble validates files before processing

rca_of_the_issue.original_issue: Video generation failing on production with files not accessible
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Local files generated on preview server not found when accessed from production, cleanup service deleting files before video assembly
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: download_file function now tries multiple URLs (local path -> BACKEND_PUBLIC_URL -> FRONTEND_URL -> preview URL) with proper fallback
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Code review verified, but full end-to-end test blocked by missing FFmpeg on preview environment
